title: International Growth Practice - Senior Associate
description:
At PwC, we help clients build trust and reinvent so they can turn complexity into a competitive advantage. We’re a tech-forward, people-empowered network with more than 370,000 people in 149 countries. Across audit and assurance, tax and legal, deals and consulting we help clients build, accelerate and sustain momentum. Find out more at www.pwc.com.
The International Growth practice is a specialized team that supports companies in internationalization, helping them in cross-border market entry and expansion as well as global footprint realignment. The team is headquartered in Singapore and operates globally, collaborating with PwC’s global network, including PwC Japan, to support clients in navigating strategic and operational issues specific to these complex new markets.

About the Role 
Be a high impact team member supporting our portfolio of client projects which are focused on driving expansion strategies for companies who are either: 

(a) seeking international expansion into a new market or region or; 

(b) exploring realignment of their existing supply chain and production footprints to being more rebalanced and resilient. 

Job description 

  • Enhance collaboration with PwC Japan and explore opportunities to support Japanese clients expand overseas  

  • Typical engagements will focus on developing in depth analysis and insights for: 

  • Market expansion strategies (Where to play) – market, consumer and competitor assessments as well as product and services analysis 

  • Market entry scenarios (How to win) – Channel strategies, operating model design, partner evaluation and selection. 

  • Global and regional site selection for new HQs, R&D sites, manufacturing / production plants 

  • Global talent assessments, to assess the availability of talent for growth strategies 

  • Supplier portfolio realignment, identifying and assessing suppliers to meet the needs of realigned supply chains and manufacturing. 

  • Strategic points of view focused on international growth 

  • In addition, support client discussions and workshops with senior executives of corporate organisations and governments. 

  • Engage in business development and client pursuit efforts 

  • Work closely with PwC’s global network of teams and connect relevant expertise in PwC to address clients’ unique business challenges  

  • Establish strong international network of external stakeholders including clients and industry associations and participate in regional and international conferences and client events 

About You 

  • 5-6+ years of consulting experience with either a strategy or management consultancy firm 

  • Strong experience in project delivery with Japanese clients 

  • Experience in business development and sales with ability to develop insightful presentations to support proposals, client discussions and business development pursuits 

  • Experienced in managing data collection and analysis and resourceful with excellent research and analytical skills; can transform quantitative and qualitative data into insights relating to country, sector and consumer trends, competitive intelligence 

  • Thrives in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment 

  • Business-level proficiency in English and Japanese to support effective communication with Japanese-speaking internal and external stakeholders

  • Possess strong communication and presentation skills 

  • Team player comfortable with working in a multi-cultural and diverse global team

At PwC, our purpose is to build trust in society and solve important problems. We’re a network of firms in 157 countries with more than 223,000 people who are committed to delivering quality in assurance, advisory and tax services. Find out more and tell us what matters to you by visiting us at www.pwc.com.
